From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

2012 Saskatchewan municipal elections

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| --- | |
| ← [2009](/wiki/2009_Saskatchewan_municipal_elections "2009 Saskatchewan municipal elections")  **October 24, 2012**  [2016](/wiki/2016_Saskatchewan_municipal_elections "2016 Saskatchewan municipal elections") → | |
|  | |
| --- | |

The [Canadian province](/wiki/Provinces_and_territories_of_Canada "Provinces and territories of Canada") of [Saskatchewan](/wiki/Saskatchewan "Saskatchewan") held municipal elections in its cities, town, villages and odd-numbered rural municipalities on October 24, 2012.

Listed are the results of selected municipal mayoral and city councillor races across the province.

| Jim Halladay | 299 |  |
